item.label: [PKT-LFC-004](task-0048): Update Dispatch and Version Module Selection
item.summary: Dispatch updates and select version modules

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-LFC-004](task-0038): Update Dispatch and Version Module Selection

## Purpose

Dispatch updates and select version modules.

## Scope

- Update dispatch
- Version selection
- Module loading

## Implementation

1. Implement dispatch
2. Add version selection
3. Load modules

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Updates dispatched correctly
2. Versions selected properly
3. Modules loaded
